locations.name: 厄瓜多尔
locations.summary: 厄瓜多尔共和国（西班牙語：República del Ecuador），通稱厄瓜多尔（Ecuador），是位於南美洲西北部的國家，北面與哥倫比亞相鄰，南接祕魯，西面為太平洋，另包括距離厄瓜多本土1,000公里的加拉巴哥群島。 厄瓜多於18…

locations.name: 秘鲁

relations.subject: Bearded guan
relations.evidence: It is found in Ecuador and Peru

relations.subject: Bearded guan
relations.evidence: Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forest
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Bearded guan
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Bearded guan
relations.evidence: The greatest threat to the bearded guan (Penelope barbata) is deforestation for agriculture and mining
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
